dbEquipBonuses.description: When you kill an enemy, your Critical Severity increases by 5% for 10 seconds.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Survivor's Savagery
dbEquipBonuses.description: When your health is 50% or more, your Critical Strike is increased by 10,000. When your health is below 50%, Critical Avoidance is increased by 10,000.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Bulwark's Shield
dbEquipBonuses.description: You take 5% less damage from Ranged attacks.

dbEquipBonuses.description: You take 5% less damage from Ranged attacks.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Enveloped Rage (Greater)
dbEquipBonuses.description: When in combat with 3 or more enemies, your Critical Severity is increased by 1.8% every 2 seconds. Every 2 seconds you are in combat with 1 or fewer enemies, lose 1 stack. Max 5 stacks: 9% Critical Severity.

dbEquipBonuses.description: When in combat with 3 or more enemies, your Critical Severity is increased by 1.8% every 2 seconds. Every 2 seconds you are in combat with 1 or fewer enemies, lose 1 stack. Max 5 stacks: 9% Critical Severity.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Leader's Might
dbEquipBonuses.description: Gain 250 Power for each player in your team.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Escalating Torrent
dbEquipBonuses.description: Gain 400 Power for 10 seconds when you strike an enemy, lose a stack when you are struck. Stacks 20 times.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Escalating Torrent
dbEquipBonuses.description: Gain 400 Power for 10 seconds when you strike an enemy, lose a stack when you are struck. Stacks 20 times.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Challenger's Presence
dbEquipBonuses.description: When in combat with only 1 enemy, every 2 seconds you gain 875 Power and 0.5% Critical Strike. Max 5 stacks: 4,375 Power and 2.5% Critical Strike.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Challenger's Presence
dbEquipBonuses.description: When in combat with only 1 enemy, every 2 seconds you gain 875 Power and 0.5% Critical Strike. Max 5 stacks: 4,375 Power and 2.5% Critical Strike.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Greater Adaptive Strength
dbEquipBonuses.description: Your Divinity maximum increases by 15%. Gain 3.5% Critical Severity.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Butcher's Zeal
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you damage or heal your target for more than 15% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, you gain 10 Action Points. Can only occur once every 5 seconds.

dbEquipBonuses.name: At-Will Perk
dbEquipBonuses.description: Your At-Will Powers do 3% more damage.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Critical Force
dbEquipBonuses.description: Whenever you Critically Strike with your Powers, you have a 10% chance to deal 150 magnitude damage around you. This effect may only occur once every 15 seconds.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Critical Force
dbEquipBonuses.description: Whenever you Critically Strike with your Powers, you have a 10% chance to deal 150 magnitude damage around you. This effect may only occur once every 15 seconds.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Encounter Perk
dbEquipBonuses.description: Your Encounter Powers do 3% more damage.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Challenger's Precision
dbEquipBonuses.description: When in combat with only 1 enemy, your Critical Strike is increased by 1.5% every 2 seconds. Max 5 stacks: 7.5% Critical Strike.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Precision Against Odds
dbEquipBonuses.description: Each enemy you are in combat with increases your Critical Strike by 1.8%. Max 5 targets: 9% Critical Strike.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Survivor's Might
dbEquipBonuses.description: Whenever you Deflect an attack, gain 1000 Power for 10 seconds. (Max 5 stacks)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Masterful Resourcefulness
dbEquipBonuses.description: Your Divinity/Performance/Soulweave maximum increases by 20%. Gain 4.5% Forte.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Skirmisher's Versatility
dbEquipBonuses.description: Whenever you deal CA damage with your powers, 10% chance to increase one of Accuracy/CA/Critical Avoidance/Deflect Severity by 8% for 10s. (30s CD)
